decisions.decision: Netlify CLI (not git-CD); draft deploys (no --prod) preview without touching the team's prod link

decisions.decision: Smoking-status hero example (question text primary + response codes -> one CDE; variable name is a differentiator, not the matched key)

decisions.decision: Works Cited: Nature style, impact-ordered, verified DOIs only (no fabrication)
decisions.rationale: user requested Nature style + all hyperlinks/DOIs; Mimno 2011 & Newman 2010 genuinely have none

context_notes: Full v1.2 arc (landing + PH branding + works-cited) is committed on feature/ui-guide-tooltips-notebook-demo (tip 5616314) and live on prod. Anti-patterns this session (advisory): SPA scrolls inside <main> not body (Playwright); brand-guide lockup naming is inverted (icon-text=dark wordmark for light bg, icon-dark-text=white wordmark for dark bg); text-neutral-800 is an undefined token; don't fabricate DOIs for the two pre-2012 ACL papers. PH logo assets in frontend/src/assets/ph/ (downscaled). Playwright installed --no-save (gitignored).
